mapper.insert: INSERT INTO group_buys ( user_seq, item_seq, group_name, description, target_participants, current_participants, quantity, total_amount, end_date, delivery_method, delivery_date, delivery_notice, status, created_at ) VALUES ( #{userSeq}, #{itemSeq}, #{groupName}, #{description}, #{targetParticipants}, 0, #{quantity}, #{totalAmount}, #{endDate}, #{deliveryMethod}, #{deliveryDate}, #{deliveryNotice}, 'RECRUITING', CURRENT_TIMESTAMP )
mapper.select:
SELECT group_buy_seq AS groupBuySeq, user_seq AS userSeq, item_seq AS itemSeq, group_name AS groupName, description, target_participants AS targetParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, quantity, total_amount AS totalAmount, end_date AS endDate, delivery_method AS deliveryMethod, delivery_date AS deliveryDate, delivery_notice AS deliveryNotice, status, created_at AS createdAt FROM group_buys
user_seq = #{userSeq}
AND group_buy_seq IN ( SELECT group_buy_seq FROM group_buy_participants WHERE user_seq = #{userSeq} )
ORDER BY created_at DESC

SELECT group_buy_seq AS groupBuySeq, user_seq AS userSeq, target_participants AS targetParticipants, current_participants AS currentParticipants, end_date AS endDate, status FROM group_buys WHERE group_buy_seq = #{groupBuySeq}
mapper.update: UPDATE group_buys SET current_participants = current_participants + 1 WHERE group_buy_seq = #{groupBuySeq} AND current_participants < target_participants AND status = 'RECRUITING'
mapper.select: SELECT p.user_seq AS userSeq, s.company_name AS companyName, s.address1, s.address2, s.ceo_name AS ceoName, p.payment_status AS paymentStatus, p.delivery_status AS deliveryStatus FROM group_buy_participants p JOIN users u ON p.user_seq = u.user_seq JOIN stores s ON u.user_seq = s.user_seq WHERE p.group_buy_seq = #{groupBuySeq}
